ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "in_subcohort" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient is in a subcohort */,
  "stage" INTEGER /* Stage of the patient's condition */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution involved in the patient's care */,
  "histology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the histology type of the patient */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the patient is participating in */,
  "edrel" INTEGER /* Elapsed days from the start of the study to the last follow-up */,
  "relapse" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has relapsed */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient */,
  "alcohol_status" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status of the patient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kilograms */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in centimeters */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies the patient has */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Information about the patient's family medical history */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any existing medical conditions the patient has */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient for follow-ups */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cohort the patient is in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_histology_id FOREIGN KEY ("histology_id") REFERENCES histologies ("histology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., Hospital, Clinic, Research Lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "histologies" (
  "histology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each histology type */,
  "histology_name" TEXT /* Name of the histology type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the histology type */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code for the histology type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the histology type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("histology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator of the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., Ongoing, Completed, Suspended) */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cohorts" (
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cohort */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the cohort belongs to */,
  "cohort_name" TEXT /* Name of the cohort */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cohort */,
  "cohort_size" INTEGER /* Size of the cohort */,
  "inclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Inclusion criteria for the cohort */,
  "exclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Exclusion criteria for the cohort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cohorts_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., Drug, Surgery, Therapy) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the treatment, if applicable */,
  "route_of_administration" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., Oral, Intravenous) */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Any known side effects of the treatment */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_treatment" (
  "patient_treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment for the patient */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment for the patient */,
  "treatment_response" TEXT /* Patient's response to the treatment (e.g., Positive, Negative, No Change) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up for the treatment */,
  "administered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who administered the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatment_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatment_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatment_administered_by FOREIGN KEY ("administered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relapse_events" (
  "relapse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relapse event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "relapse_date" TEXT /* Date of the relapse event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the relapse event */,
  "relapse_type" TEXT /* Type of relapse (e.g., Local, Distant) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the relapse */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment the patient was receiving at the time of relapse */,
  "administered_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who recorded the relapse event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relapse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relapse_events_administered_by FOREIGN KEY ("administered_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relapse_events_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relapse_events_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used in hashing the password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the patient data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the patient data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Specific resource accessed (e.g., Patient Record, Study Data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
